languages.text: {n}Меровцы, конечно же, были недовольны — но чернь редко понимает замыслы властителей. Они лишь наблюдали и держались в стороне, мечтая вступить в бой. Пока не пришел последний рапорт: пришлые ксеносы пробились к руины и перенесли бои в логово отвратительных тварей, носящих человеческую плоть как одеяния. Чем бы не кончилось их столкновение, Человечество и Зарков останутся в выигрыше.{/n}

{n}The Merovians, of course, were displeased — but the rabble rarely understand the designs of their overlords. They only observed and kept their distance, all while longing to join the fray. Then came the last report: the xenos had made their way to the ruins and had taken the fighting to a den of hideous creatures that wore human flesh as clothing. No matter how their confrontation might end, Humanity and Zarkov will reap the benefits.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Меровцы, конечно же, были недовольны — но чернь редко понимает замыслы властителей. Они лишь наблюдали и держались в стороне, мечтая вступить в бой. Пока не пришел последний рапорт: пришлые ксеносы пробились к руины и перенесли бои в логово отвратительных тварей, носящих человеческую плоть как одеяния. Чем бы не кончилось их столкновение, Человечество и Зарков останутся в выигрыше.{/n}

languages.text: {n}当然のことながら、メロヴィアンたちは不満を抱いた。だが、民衆は主君の意図を理解することは稀だ。彼らはただ遠くから観察し、戦いの渦に巻き込まれることを望みながらも距離を保った。そして、最後の報告が来た。異星人は遺跡へと進み、人間の皮を身につけた醜悪な生き物の巣窟で戦いを繰り広げていた。彼らの対決の行方はどうあれ、人類とザルコフは恩恵を受けるだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians, of course, were displeased — but the rabble rarely understand the designs of their overlords. They only observed and kept their distance, all while longing to join the fray. Then came the last report: the xenos had made their way to the ruins and had taken the fighting to a den of hideous creatures that wore human flesh as clothing. No matter how their confrontation might end, Humanity and Zarkov will reap the benefits.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 当然のことながら、メロヴィアンたちは不満を抱いた。だが、民衆は主君の意図を理解することは稀だ。彼らはただ遠くから観察し、戦いの渦に巻き込まれることを望みながらも距離を保った。そして、最後の報告が来た。異星人は遺跡へと進み、人間の皮を身につけた醜悪な生き物の巣窟で戦いを繰り広げていた。彼らの対決の行方はどうあれ、人類とザルコフは恩恵を受けるだろう。

languages.text: {n}Por supuesto, los merovianos quedaron insatisfechos, pero la chusma rara vez entiende los designios de su señor supremo. Se limitaron a observar desde lejos, anhelando participar en la lucha. Entonces llegó el último informe: los xenos se habían abierto paso hasta las ruinas y luchaban contra unos espantosos seres ataviados con carne humana. Independientemente del resultado del conflicto, la Humanidad y Zarkov se beneficiarían.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians, of course, were displeased — but the rabble rarely understand the designs of their overlords. They only observed and kept their distance, all while longing to join the fray. Then came the last report: the xenos had made their way to the ruins and had taken the fighting to a den of hideous creatures that wore human flesh as clothing. No matter how their confrontation might end, Humanity and Zarkov will reap the benefits.{/n}

Se limitaron a observar desde lejos, anhelando participar en la lucha. Independientemente del resultado del conflicto, la Humanidad y Zarkov se beneficiarían.{/n}

languages.text: {n}梅罗夫人当然满腹牢骚，但贱民又岂能理解统治者的深谋远虑。他们只能远远观望，竭力按捺参战的冲动。最终报告传来：异形已深入遗迹，与那些披人皮的可憎生物展开厮杀。无论这场冲突结果如何，人类与扎尔科夫都将坐收渔利。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians, of course, were displeased — but the rabble rarely understand the designs of their overlords. They only observed and kept their distance, all while longing to join the fray. Then came the last report: the xenos had made their way to the ruins and had taken the fighting to a den of hideous creatures that wore human flesh as clothing. No matter how their confrontation might end, Humanity and Zarkov will reap the benefits.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}梅罗夫人当然满腹牢骚，但贱民又岂能理解统治者的深谋远虑。他们只能远远观望，竭力按捺参战的冲动。最终报告传来：异形已深入遗迹，与那些披人皮的可憎生物展开厮杀。无论这场冲突结果如何，人类与扎尔科夫都将坐收渔利。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Merovianer waren freilich unzufrieden ... aber das gemeine Volk versteht nur selten die Pläne seiner Herren. Sie sahen einfach aus sicherer Entfernung zu und hätten sich nur allzu gerne selbst in die Schlacht gestürzt. Dann traf der letzte Bericht ein: Die Xenos waren in die Ruinen eingedrungen und hatten den Kampf zu einer Horde abscheulicher Kreaturen getragen, die menschliches Fleisch als Kleidung trugen. Egal, wie ihre Konfrontation auch enden mag ... die Menschheit und Zarkov werden die Früchte ernten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians, of course, were displeased — but the rabble rarely understand the designs of their overlords. They only observed and kept their distance, all while longing to join the fray. Then came the last report: the xenos had made their way to the ruins and had taken the fighting to a den of hideous creatures that wore human flesh as clothing. No matter how their confrontation might end, Humanity and Zarkov will reap the benefits.{/n}

Dann traf der letzte Bericht ein: Die Xenos waren in die Ruinen eingedrungen und hatten den Kampf zu einer Horde abscheulicher Kreaturen getragen, die menschliches Fleisch als Kleidung trugen. Egal, wie ihre Konfrontation auch enden mag ... die Menschheit und Zarkov werden die Früchte ernten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Merovlular elbette memnun kalmadı. Ancak ayaktakımı, efendilerinin tasarılarını nadiren anlar. Savaşa katılmak için yanıp tutuşurken sadece izleyip mesafelerini korudular. Sonra son rapor geldi: Zenolar, harabelere doğru ilerlemiş ve savaşı insan etini giysi olarak giyen iğrenç yaratıkların inine taşımıştı. Çatışmaları nasıl biterse bitsin İnsanlık ve Zarkov bundan fayda görecek.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians, of course, were displeased — but the rabble rarely understand the designs of their overlords. They only observed and kept their distance, all while longing to join the fray. Then came the last report: the xenos had made their way to the ruins and had taken the fighting to a den of hideous creatures that wore human flesh as clothing. No matter how their confrontation might end, Humanity and Zarkov will reap the benefits.{/n}

Sonra son rapor geldi: Zenolar, harabelere doğru ilerlemiş ve savaşı insan etini giysi olarak giyen iğrenç yaratıkların inine taşımıştı. Çatışmaları nasıl biterse bitsin İnsanlık ve Zarkov bundan fayda görecek.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les Meroviens furent déçus, bien sûr, mais la plèbe saisit rarement les desseins de ses maîtres. Ils se contentèrent d'observer à distance, avides de se joindre aux hostilités. Puis vint l'ultime rapport : les xénos avaient atteint les ruines et pris d'assaut l'antre des immondes créatures habillées de chair humaine. Peu importait l'issue de la confrontation, l'humanité et Zarkov en récolteraient les fruits.{/n}
